# Albedo

> Trajectory-distillation king-of-the-hill subnet on Bittensor. Miners submit challengers; the reigning king and challenger duel on SWE-ZERO rollouts judged by an ensemble of LLMs. Full duel traces are published for downstream distillation.

**Subnet:** `ALBEDO_NETUID=97` (finney)

## Repository

Canonical open-source repo for this subnet:

| | |
|---|---|
| **GitHub** | https://github.com/unarbos/albedo |
| **Org / repo** | `unarbos/albedo` |
| **Default branch** | `main` |
| **README** | https://github.com/unarbos/albedo/blob/main/README.md |
| **License** | MIT |

```bash
git clone https://github.com/unarbos/albedo.git
cd albedo
uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate
uv pip install -e .
```

Do not use `github.com/albedo/albedo` ‚Äî that is not this project. The dashboard GitHub icon and all docs point at `unarbos/albedo`.

## Codebase

- **Layout (repo root):**
  - `chain.toml` ‚Äî active chain, judges, dataset pin, duel knobs (single source of truth)
  - `chain_config.py` ‚Äî loads `chain.toml` into constants
  - `validator.py` ‚Äî on-chain reveal scanner, config gate, duel dispatch, weights, dashboard
  - `eval.py` ‚Äî GPU eval server (vLLM king + challenger, judges, eval-trace sink)
  - `miner.py` ‚Äî download king, build challenger, upload to Hippius Hub, `set_reveal_commitment`
  - `model_store.py` ‚Äî Hippius/HF `repo@digest` download, upload, v4 reveal helpers
  - `judge.py`, `trajectory_sampler.py` ‚Äî Chutes LLM-as-judge + SWE-ZERO parquet sampling
  - `scripts/prefetch_dataset.py` ‚Äî download pinned eval shard
  - `scripts/start_eval.sh` ‚Äî eval-box env + `uvicorn eval:app`
  - `scripts/seed_genesis.py` ‚Äî one-shot genesis king upload
  - `website/` ‚Äî static dashboard UI (`index.html`, `dashboard.example.json`, this file)
- **Override chain for experiments:** `ALBEDO_CHAIN_OVERRIDE=/path/to/alt.toml`

## Website

- **Live UI:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/index.html
  - Mirrors: https://eu-central-1.hippius.com/albedo/index.html , https://s3.hippius.com/albedo/index.html
- **Machine-readable state:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/dashboard.json
  - `king` ‚Äî current `model_repo`, `king_digest`, hotkey, per-judge bars
  - `king_chain` ‚Äî rolling payout set (up to 5 kings)
  - `queue`, `history`, `current_eval`
- **This file:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/llms.txt

## Eval dataset

The duel fixture set is a **single pinned parquet shard** from the SWE-ZERO trajectory corpus (not the full 12M rows).

- **HF dataset:** https://huggingface.co/datasets/AlienKevin/SWE-ZERO-12M-trajectories
- **Pinned shard** (in `chain.toml [dataset]`): `data/train-00000.parquet`
- **Contents:** multi-turn SWE-bench-style agent trajectories (generated at T=1.0, 32k context cap)

**Download (validators / eval operators):**

```bash
cd albedo && source .venv/bin/activate
python scripts/prefetch_dataset.py [--out /var/albedo/dataset]
```

The script prints `shard_sha256` ‚Äî paste into `chain.toml [dataset].shard_sha256`. On the GPU eval box:

```bash
export ALBEDO_DATASET_SHARD_PATH=/var/albedo/dataset/train-00000.parquet
```

`eval.py` refuses to start if the on-disk file hash does not match `shard_sha256`.

## Models (king & challengers)

Weights are immutable **`namespace/ModelName@digest`** refs. Digests:

- `sha256:<64hex>` ‚Äî Hippius Hub OCI manifest (challenger uploads, genesis king)
- `hf:<40hex>` ‚Äî HuggingFace commit SHA (vanilla HF repos without a Hippius mirror)

**Where to discover refs**

- Current king: `dashboard.json` ‚Üí `king.model_repo`, `king.king_digest` (or `model_digest`)
- Genesis fallback: `chain.toml` ‚Üí `[chain].seed_repo`, `[seed].seed_digest` (currently HF: `ricdomolm/mini-coder-1.7b@hf:ea686024‚Ä¶`)
- Registry UI: https://registry.hippius.com (search `albedo-mini-1.7b-*` under your namespace)

**Download in Python** (`model_store.materialize_model`):

```python
from model_store import ModelRef, materialize_model
ref = ModelRef("teutonic/albedo-mini-1.7b-miner0", "sha256:...")
path = materialize_model(ref, local_dir="/tmp/my-model", max_workers=16)
```

**Auth for Hippius Hub** (download + miner upload):

- **Registry push/pull** (OCI): robot login via `hippius-hub login --username ‚Ä¶ --password ‚Ä¶`, or env vars read by `model_store.py`:
  - `ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_USERNAME` + `ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_PASSWORD` (recommended for miners ‚Äî push-scoped project key)
  - `HIPPIUS_HUB_USERNAME` + `HIPPIUS_HUB_PASSWORD` (legacy fallback)
- **Console API** (provision namespace, rotate secrets, create push keys): token from https://console.hippius.com ‚Üí `hippius-hub login --hippius-token ‚Ä¶` (stored as `~/.cache/hippius/hub/api_token`; can also set `HIPPIUS_CONSOLE_TOKEN` in your secrets manager).
- **S3 keys** (`HIPPIUS_ACCESS_KEY`, `R2_*`, etc.) work for dashboard/state/dataset buckets only ‚Äî they do **not** authenticate `upload_folder` / registry blob pushes.

If both `ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_*` and `HIPPIUS_HUB_*` are set, **`ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_*` wins** (so a stale shared `teutonic-bot` password does not override your miner push key).

**HF-only pulls:** set digest `hf:<commit>`; optional `HF_TOKEN` / `HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY`. For uploads without Hippius, set `ALBEDO_UPLOAD_BACKEND=hf` (returns `hf:` digests; king may still be HF-backed).

**Genesis one-shot** (operators): `python scripts/seed_genesis.py` downloads `ricdomolm/mini-coder-1.7b` from HF, uploads to Hippius, prints digest for `chain.toml [seed].seed_digest`.

**Challenger repo naming:** must match `chain.toml` `repo_pattern` (currently `^[^/]+/albedo-mini-1.7b-.+$`), e.g. `teutonic/albedo-mini-1.7b-myhotkey`. Display name in `[chain].name` is `Albedo-Mini-1.7B` but **Hippius registry paths must be lowercase** ‚Äî set `ALBEDO_CHALLENGER_REPO_NAME=albedo-mini-1.7b` when running `miner.py` if your tooling derives repos from the display name.

## Mining (submit a challenger)

Goal: beat the king on the judge duel, take emission (plus rolling share for past kings ‚Äî see King).

**Prerequisites**

- Registered hotkey on the subnet (`ALBEDO_NETUID`)
- Hippius Hub **push** auth (see Models) ‚Äî read-only / S3 creds are not enough
- Bittensor wallet (`BT_WALLET_NAME`); coldkey unlock via `BT_WALLET_PASSWORD`
- Enough TAO to register if not already on the subnet (`btcli subnet register --netuid ‚Ä¶`)

**Run (Hippius path ‚Äî production)**

```bash
cd albedo && source .venv/bin/activate
export ALBEDO_NETUID=<subnet>
export BT_WALLET_NAME=<wallet>
export ALBEDO_CHALLENGER_NAMESPACE=<your-hippius-namespace>   # e.g. teutonic
export ALBEDO_CHALLENGER_REPO_NAME=albedo-mini-1.7b           # required: lowercase for Hippius
export ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_USERNAME=robot$<namespace>+<push-key>
export ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_PASSWORD=<push-secret>
python miner.py --hotkey <hotkey_name> [--noise 0.001] [--force]
```

**Run (HF fallback ‚Äî smoke tests only)**

```bash
export ALBEDO_UPLOAD_BACKEND=hf
export ALBEDO_CHALLENGER_NAMESPACE=<your-hf-user>             # must own the namespace on HF
export HF_TOKEN=...
python miner.py --hotkey <hotkey_name> --noise 0.001
```

**What `miner.py` does**

1. Fetches `dashboard.json` for current `king` repo + digest (falls back to seed)
2. `materialize_model` king weights locally
3. `train_or_perturb` ‚Äî default is tiny Gaussian noise on safetensors (pipeline stub only; real dethrones need real SFT/RL)
4. Validates `config.json` matches king arch locks (`chain.toml [arch].extra_lock_keys`)
5. `upload_model_folder` ‚Üí Hippius Hub (or HF if `ALBEDO_UPLOAD_BACKEND=hf`)
6. `set_reveal_commitment` with v4 payload: `v4|<repo>|<digest>|<author_hotkey>`

**Gates:** validator skips if you are the current king, or already have a reveal (1 eval per hotkey). Use `--force` to override warnings.

**Swap training:** replace `train_or_perturb` in `miner.py` with your training loop; keep upload + reveal unchanged.

### Mining gotchas

**Hippius registry**

- Provision your namespace once: `hippius-hub login --hippius-token ‚Ä¶` then `hippius-hub registry provision <namespace> --docker-login` (Free plan = 1 namespace per account).
- Create a **push** project key: `hippius-hub registry keys create <name> --role push` ‚Äî save the secret immediately; use as `ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_USERNAME` / `ALBEDO_HIPPIUS_PASSWORD`.
- **Lowercase repo paths only.** Uploads to `‚Ä¶/Albedo-Mini-1.7B-‚Ä¶` (mixed case) return `401` from `registry.hippius.com`. Always use `albedo-mini-1.7b-<suffix>`.
- Do not confuse console token (`hippius-hub login --hippius-token`, ~40 hex chars from console.hippius.com) with the robot push secret (used with `--username` / `--password`).
- `hippius-hub login` printing ‚Äúsaved‚Äù does not validate the token ‚Äî test with `hippius-hub registry me`.
- Shared org namespaces (e.g. `teutonic/`) may already exist; you need your own push key on that project, not just read creds.

**On-chain / validator**

- Reveal format is **v4 only**: `v4|repo|sha256:‚Ä¶|hotkey` (or `hf:‚Ä¶` digest). Legacy v3 reveals are dropped.
- **One eval per hotkey** ‚Äî a second submission from the same hotkey is ignored after the first duel completes.
- You **cannot challenge as the current king** hotkey (validator skips).
- After commit, wait ~30s (commit-reveal blocks) before the validator picks up the reveal.
- Challenger must pass server-side gates: repo matches `repo_pattern`, arch locks match king, no `*.py` or `auto_map` in the Hub snapshot, at least one `.safetensors`.

**Wallet / env**

- `Wallet.unlock_coldkey(password=‚Ä¶)` is not used ‚Äî miner decrypts via `wallet.coldkey_file.decrypt()`.
- Set `ALBEDO_NETUID` explicitly; default `0` aborts with an error.
- Default noise (`--noise 0.001`) will **not** dethrone a real king ‚Äî expect `REJECTED` (0 wins, ties on all judges). That is a successful pipeline smoke test.

**Monitoring**

- Dashboard: https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/dashboard.json ‚Äî watch `queue` ‚Üí `current_eval` ‚Üí `history`.
- Typical smoke-test timeline: upload ~3 min (1.7B) ‚Üí reveal ‚Üí validator download from Hippius ~20s ‚Üí eval ~60‚Äì90s ‚Üí verdict logged.

**Hippius setup cheat sheet**

```bash
hippius-hub login --hippius-token <console-token>
hippius-hub registry me                              # confirm project + namespace
hippius-hub registry keys create my-miner --role push
hippius-hub login --username 'robot$<ns>+my-miner' --password '<secret>'
hippius-hub upload <namespace>/albedo-mini-1.7b-test ./tiny-folder   # sanity check
hippius-hub models list --mine
```

## Mining (distillation / training data)

Every duel publishes **full turn-by-turn traces** for distillation/SFT ‚Äî not just scores.

- **Browse:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/evals/
- **Layout:** `evals/YYYY-MM-DD/<eval_id>.jsonl.gz` (gzip JSONL) + daily `manifest.jsonl`
- **Schema:** `schema_version` (currently `1`) on `duel_meta`, `turn`, and `verdict` records
- **Per file:** line 1 `duel_meta` (king, challenger, hotkey, seed, judges, gen params), then `turn` records (`messages_prefix` = dataset prefix, `messages_prompt` = what vLLM saw, `prompt_truncated` + `prompt_truncation`, king/chal replies, judge verdict + rationale + optional `king_raw`/`chal_raw`), final `verdict`
- **Manifest:** `evals/YYYY-MM-DD/manifest.jsonl` ‚Äî one line per duel with quality stats (`n_valid_turns`, `parse_failures_by_judge`, `accepted`, URL)
- **Export:** `python scripts/export_training_jsonl.py --input <url-or-path> --output training.jsonl` (SFT) or `--format dpo` for preference pairs
- **Dashboard link:** `history[].evals_url` when present
- **Local backup on eval box:** `/var/albedo/evals/` (`ALBEDO_EVALS_LOCAL_DIR`)

Download with any S3 client against the public bucket prefix, or HTTPS GET when objects are public-read.

## Validation (how duels run)

Two processes: **validator** (CPU/chain) + **eval server** (GPU). Validator reaches eval via `ALBEDO_EVAL_SERVER` (often SSH tunnel ‚Äî see `tunnel.sh`, `ecosystem.config.js`).

### Validator wallet & netuid

Albedo validator **sets weights on subnet 97**. Miners reveal on the same netuid (`ALBEDO_NETUID=97`).

| Setting | Value | Notes |
|---------|-------|-------|
| `ALBEDO_NETUID` | **97** | Reveals, metagraph, and `set_weights` all use this. |
| `BT_WALLET_NAME` | your validator wallet | Must be registered on SN97. |
| `BT_WALLET_HOTKEY` | your validator hotkey | Must match the registered hotkey SS58. |

**Do not:**

- Point the validator at an unregistered hotkey (`set_weights failed: Hotkey ‚Ä¶ not registered`).
- Change netuid without updating every component (reveals, metagraph, weights).

**Validator loop** (`validator.py`)

1. `scan_reveals` ‚Äî decode v4 on-chain commitments; filter seen hotkeys / completed repos
2. `validate_challenger_config` ‚Äî config-only Hub fetch; arch lock + no `*.py` / `auto_map`
3. `POST /eval` to eval server (SSE stream)
4. On `accepted`: crown king, `POST /set_king`, `set_weights` (split across `king_chain_depth` registered kings)
5. Flush `dashboard.json` to Hippius S3 (+ R2 fallback for private state)

**Eval server** (`eval.py` on GPU box)

1. Verify dataset shard SHA256
2. Sample `n_samples` trajectories √ó `max_turns` per duel using `seed = blake2b(block_hash || hotkey)`
3. vLLM: long-lived king (`ALBEDO_KING_GPUS`), per-duel challenger (`ALBEDO_CHAL_GPUS`)
4. Each turn: both models complete the next assistant message; Chutes judges score replies (`chain.toml [judge].models`, `CHUTES_API_KEY`)
5. Upload eval trace; emit final verdict

**Dethrone rule** (per judge model, `tie_band` default 0.01):

- **Win** on a dimension: mean(challenger ‚àí king) > `tie_band`
- **Lose:** mean delta < ‚àí`tie_band`
- **Crown** when: ‚â•1 judge dimension is a win, **and** zero dimensions are losses (ties OK on the rest)

Judges are listed in `chain.toml [judge].models` (currently DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE, Qwen3-235B-Thinking, Kimi-K2.6-TEE via Chutes).

**Eval operator startup**

```bash
# prefetch dataset first, then:
cd albedo && source .venv/bin/activate
export CHUTES_API_KEY=...
export ALBEDO_DATASET_SHARD_PATH=...
export ALBEDO_EVALS_S3_BUCKET=albedo ALBEDO_EVALS_S3_ACCESS_KEY=... ALBEDO_EVALS_S3_SECRET_KEY=...
export HIPPIUS_HUB_TOKEN=...
bash scripts/start_eval.sh
```

**Validator operator startup** (local PM2)

```bash
cd albedo
# export ALBEDO_* / BT_* / R2_* / HIPPIUS_* env vars, then:
pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only albedo-validator
# after editing ecosystem.config.js: pm2 delete albedo-validator && pm2 start ...
```

## King

- Kings are numbered ALBEDO-I, ALBEDO-II, ‚Ä¶ (Roman numerals by reign)
- Live state: https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/dashboard.json
- Genesis king weights: `ricdomolm/mini-coder-1.7b@hf:ea686024‚Ä¶` (Qwen3 1.7B); challengers upload to Hippius as `sha256:` manifests
- Rolling payout: current king + up to four prior kings share emission (`king_chain_depth = 5`)

## Links

- **GitHub:** https://github.com/unarbos/albedo
- **README:** https://github.com/unarbos/albedo/blob/main/README.md
- **Dashboard UI:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/index.html
- **Dashboard JSON:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/dashboard.json
- **Eval traces:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/evals/
- **This file:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/llms.txt
- **Hippius registry:** https://registry.hippius.com
- **SWE-ZERO dataset:** https://huggingface.co/datasets/AlienKevin/SWE-ZERO-12M-trajectories
- **Genesis model:** https://huggingface.co/ricdomolm/mini-coder-1.7b
